name: Rare
description: British game developer founded by Tim and Chris Stamper, known for Donkey Kong Country, GoldenEye 007, Banjo-Kazooie, Perfect Dark, and Sea of Thieves.

eras.title: Ultimate Era
eras.description: Tim and Chris Stamper build their reputation through Ultimate Play the Game and British microcomputer titles.

eras.title: Nintendo Era
eras.description: Rare becomes one of Nintendo's most important partners, producing NES, SNES, and Nintendo 64 classics.

eras.title: Microsoft Era
eras.description: Rare continues under Microsoft, eventually finding a major modern identity with Sea of Thieves.
